title: Assistant Store Manager - Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
